course_title: CALCULUS WITH ALGEBRA AND TRIGONOMETRY I
description: Topics in algebra, trigonometry and precalculus are integrated with elementary differential calculus. Part of a 2-semester sequence withMATH 217; these two courses together are equivalent toMATH 114and221.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MATH 96or placement intoMATH 171.MATH 118does not fulfill the requisite
